site.description: Computer Science undergraduate specializing in systems engineering, cloud infrastructure, and backend development. Building real-world systems with a focus on reliability, security, and performance.

author.name: Chinmay Singh
author.title: Computer Science Undergraduate | Systems, Cloud & C++
author.bio: Computer Science undergraduate with a strong interest in low-level systems, cloud infrastructure, and backend engineering. I enjoy building and operating real-world systems — from self-hosted server platforms to C++ command-line tools — with a focus on reliability, security, and performance.
